name: Lyle Overbay
transactions: June 2, 1999:Drafted by theArizona Diamondbacksin the18th roundof the 1999 amateur draft. Player signed June 8, 1999.

December 1, 2003:Traded by theArizona DiamondbackswithChris Capuano,Craig Counsell,Chad Moeller,Jorge De La RosaandJunior Spiveyto theMilwaukee Brewersfor a player to be named later,Shane NanceandRichie Sexson. TheMilwaukee BrewerssentNoochie Varner(minors) (December 15, 2003) to theArizona Diamondbacksto complete the trade.
December 7, 2005:Traded by theMilwaukee BrewerswithTy Taubenheimto theToronto Blue JaysforDave Bush,Gabe GrossandZach Jackson.
December 14, 2010:Signed as a Free Agent with thePittsburgh Pirates.
August 13, 2011:Signed as a Free Agent with theArizona Diamondbacks.
December 9, 2011:Signed as a Free Agent with theArizona Diamondbacks.
August 20, 2012:Signed as a Free Agent with theAtlanta Braves.
January 31, 2013:Signed as a Free Agent with theBoston Red Sox.
March 26, 2013:Signed as a Free Agent with theNew York Yankees.
January 20, 2014:Signed as a Free Agent with theMilwaukee Brewers.
